note:
{
  "experiment_overview": "The experiment aims to understand the development of compensatory pathways in a mutant malaria parasite harboring a hypomorphic allele of plant-like kinases. The goal is to elucidate mechanisms of resistance to Plasmodium falciparum kinases.",
  "procedures_observed": [
    "Incubate at 37°C under an atmosphere of 5% O2, 5% CO2, and 90% N2 for 2 hours.",
    "Adjust pH to 7.6 and filter-sterilize using a 0.22 μm syringe filter.",
    "Perform PCR verification of transgenic parasites with desired modifications of CDPK1 locus.",
    "Repeat until redness disappears completely.",
    "Perform PCR and sequence analysis."
  ],
  "materials_and_subjects": [
    "Transgenic parasites",
    "PCR buffer",
    "Plasmodium falciparum",
    "CDPK1 locus",
    "Media"
  ],
  "tools_and_setup": [
    "PCR machine",
    "Microcentrifuge",
    "Test tubes",
    "Filter sterilizer",
    "Incubator",
    "Thermometer",
    "Micropipette"
  ],
  "quantitative_observations": [
    "Temperature: 37°C",
    "Oxygen concentration: 5%",
    "Carbon dioxide concentration: 5%",
    "Nitrogen concentration: 90%",
    "pH: 7.6",
    "Time: 2 hours",
    "PCR cycles: Not specified"
  ],
  "key_transitions": [
    "Transition from incubation to pH adjustment and filtration",
    "Transition from PCR verification to repeated redness disappearance",
    "Transition from PCR to sequence analysis"
  ],
  "outcomes_or_indicators": [
    "Redness disappearance",
    "PCR positivity",
